negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_accident_1_0
prompt: The video opens with a wide-angle shot of a snowy highway during a winter storm. The sky is overcast and gray, with snowflakes continuously falling, creating a hazy and muted atmosphere. The road surface is covered with a layer of snow and slush, reflecting the recent snowfall or melting conditions. Several vehicles are visible, including a sedan stopped near the left of the road and a large semi-truck that has overturned on its side due to accident, blocking part of the lane. Debris from the accident is scattered around the overturned truck, which is tilted at an angle. In the background, additional vehicles can be seen, some appearing to be stuck due to the accident conditions. A person is standing near the sedan, possibly assessing the situation or assisting with the accident. The surrounding area includes patches of grass and low vegetation visible through the snow, suggesting the highway is in a rural or less developed region.  As the video progresses, a large white semi-truck drives onto the overturned truck, kicking up a significant amount of debris in its wake. The truck moves from right to left across the frame, partially obscuring the view of the accident site. By the final frame, the semi-truck has crashed further down the road, leaving behind a trail of disturbed debris. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the unfolding chaos and the harsh winter conditions.
